scripts.dev: concurrently -k "cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000 vite" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron ."
scripts.electron:build: vite build && electron-builder --win dir && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const o='release/win-unpacked'; const n='release/push-box-game'; if(fs.existsSync(o)){try{fs.renameSync(o,n)}catch(e){fs.cpSync(o,n,{recursive:true});fs.rmSync(o,{recursive:true})}}"
